mapper.select: SELECT menu_oid FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE menu_cd = #{menuCd} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_auth_lv, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, use_yn, icon_nm, menu_expln, prvc_use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE menu_page = #{menuPage} AND use_yn = 'Y'
